steps.script: () => { const wrap = document.querySelector('.cheetah-modal-wrap'); if (!wrap) return { skipped: true }; const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const isVisible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0; }; const btns = Array.from(wrap.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]')).filter(isVisible); const ok = btns.find(b => /确定|完成|提交/.test(norm(b.textContent || ''))); if (ok) { ok.click(); return { success: true }; } return { success: false }; }

steps.regex: 确认发布|确定发布|确认|发布
